summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/10/2025
Today, iron ore futures ini ally fell but then rose, holding up well throughout the day. The most-traded contract I2601 closed at 804.5, up 1.13% WoW.Traders sold at market prices; with significant price fluctua ons, steel mills cau ously observed and inquiries were generally subdued. Market transac on ac vity was sluggish.
